title: I Release Rushing to the Next Goal and Allow Present Gratitude
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the habit of skipping past what is built toward what is next
excerpt: A short energy statement from the Day 78 theme of a 12-week money programme. The release names the habit of rushing past the current abundance toward the next target. The allow names the full, present experience of the wealth, income, and freedom already here.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 78 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796). The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you keep moving straight from one financial goal to the next without pausing to register what has already been built.

content.text: A short energy statement from the Day 78 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 78 opens Week 12 with the theme of living abundance as a normal state. The release names the forward-rush that skips past the current abundance. The allow names the full present experience of everything already built.

I am ready to release the habit of rushing past what I have built toward what comes next, without pausing to feel the wealth that is already here. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow the full, present experience of deep gratitude for the wealth, income, and freedom that already fill my life right now. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from the Day 78 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
